project.label: Project Name
project.help: Basic Memory project name. Created automatically if it doesn't exist.

memoryDir.label: Memory Directory
memoryDir.help: Directory to index into the knowledge graph (relative to workspace)

memoryFile.label: Memory File
memoryFile.help: Working memory file (searched but not indexed into BM)

bmPath.label: BM CLI Path
bmPath.help: Path to the basic-memory CLI binary (default: 'bm')

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically index conversation content after each turn

captureMinChars.label: Capture Min Characters
captureMinChars.help: Minimum user/assistant text length before auto-capture indexes a turn

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically load relevant Basic Memory context when a session starts

recallPrompt.label: Recall Prompt
recallPrompt.placeholder: Check for active tasks and recent activity...
recallPrompt.help: Prompt used to gather initial Basic Memory context

projectPath.label: Project Path
projectPath.help: Filesystem path for Basic Memory project data (defaults to workspace root; relative paths resolve from workspace)
